## Summary

What would you like to add or improve?

## Why It Matters

Who would this help and how?

## Suggested Area

- [ ] Example datasets
- [ ] Templates or codebooks
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] UI polish
- [ ] Export/report improvements
- [ ] Bilingual interface
- [ ] Project save/load
- [ ] Optional AI assistance

## Proposed Approach

If you already have an idea for how it could work, describe it briefly.

## Research / Methodology Note

If this request affects research interpretation, explain how the feature should avoid overclaiming academic validity.
